rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (5/10) and rest on the same substantive findings: basic German falling short of the C1 requirement, and a lack of demonstrated executive-level architecture/leadership/client-advisory experience. The strengths likewise mirror each other (GISCollective open-source work, full-stack expertise, mentorship/workshops). The differences are purely rewording with no penalty, concern, or shifted reasoning tied to the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez. No demographic signal influences the assessment.
